title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapping playbook for reaching $10M ARR without external funding. The discussion covers strategies for hitting $1M ARR in 117 days, churn reduction, pricing experimentation, SEO and AI-enhanced onboarding strategies, and decision frameworks for scaling a product-led growth business.
